set_fields.acceptance_criteria: init_experiment/run_experiment/log_experiment are no longer part of steady-state autoresearch workflow, autoresearch_run creates exactly one pending trial, autoresearch_done is the only finalizer, second runs before finalization fail fast, wrong-session calls fail fast, run artifacts persist under .pi/loops/runs/**, restart-time pending-trial recovery is tested, and extensions/tau gate passes.
